hitPoints.notes: Base H.P. = P.E. attribute number + 1D6 at level 1; +1D6 per level from level 2. A character is comatose from 0 down to -(P.E. attribute) and dead below that.

physicalSdc.notes: Default when an O.C.C./R.C.C. doesn't specify S.D.C. Physical skills and O.C.C./R.C.C. bonuses add to it (all accumulative). Damage is taken from S.D.C. before Hit Points.
